---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve. Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include details about:

- Which part of the system it affects (tool, skill, monitor, core, etc.)
- Expected behavior
- Any API integrations or dependencies required

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them briefly.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues that provide more context.
